title: Blockchain analytics
doc_html:
§1395. Blockchain analytics

            All virtual currency kiosk operators shall use blockchain analytics software to assist in the prevention of sending purchased virtual currency from a virtual currency kiosk operator to a digital wallet known to be affiliated with fraudulent activity at the time of a transaction. The commissioner may request evidence from any virtual currency kiosk operator of current use of blockchain analytics.

            Acts 2025, No. 369, §1.
doc_text:
§1395.  Blockchain analytics
All virtual currency kiosk operators shall use blockchain analytics software to assist
in the prevention of sending purchased virtual currency from a virtual currency kiosk
operator to a digital wallet known to be affiliated with fraudulent activity at the time of a
transaction.  The commissioner may request evidence from any virtual currency kiosk
operator of current use of blockchain analytics.
Acts 2025, No. 369, §1.
